visual_message: Una solución sobredimensionada de USD 30.000 pesa sobre una necesidad que podía resolverse con un recurso pequeño ya disponible.
concept: Una roca monumental representa la compra externa; un pequeño módulo aqua sostiene la solución real.
conceptual_rationale: La diferencia de escala vuelve visible la desproporción entre la inversión prevista y la solución necesaria.

generation.prompt: High-end editorial conceptual art, vertical 4:5 composition, off-white studio background. A monumental, extremely heavy dark stone monolith represents an unnecessary USD 30,000 software purchase; the scale must feel excessive and intimidating. Under one edge of the monolith, a very small precise mint-aqua modular connector or compact toolbox effortlessly solves the actual problem and supports the system. Strong contrast of scale: huge expensive solution versus tiny adequate solution. Refined sculptural object, controlled realistic shadow, premium art-direction, minimal composition, lots of negative space, Motion color accents in orange, deep purple and mint aqua. No people, no screens, no dashboards, no lines-and-nodes diagrams, no text, no letters, no logos, no numbers embedded in the image.
